name: Fantasy Roleplay with custom worldbuilding
description:
This is an experimental scenario bot that should allow you to play a randomized story set in a fantasy world of my building. The definition is open if you're curious to take a look, but I'd advise to go in blind first a few times as to avoid spoilers.

The introductory message will ask you to 'create' your character before the roleplay will begin - the bot is instructed to generate a random situation for you. You can either copy/paste your persona in here, ask the bot to make a random character for you or give it a few guidelines like /gender/age/etc and let them do the rest.
creator: Partysnacks
